originalAlarm.description: Branch condition evaluates to a garbage value

reasoning: 061fd0a353e.c L20: 'if(!p)' branch evaluates garbage value (// ERROR). p is uninitialized when 'case U' is reached without prior 'case W' setting p. Critically, 'goto expected_hwif_error' at L21 targets a label defined only inside #ifdef HDPARM_HDIO_SCAN_HWIF — so the code only compiles when SCAN_HWIF=T. PC=HDPARM_UNREGISTER=T AND HDPARM_SCAN=T correctly identifies both required conditions. Known bug (// ERROR at L20-21). Correctly constrained PC.
